name: Mussels and Shrimp with Penne
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh tomatoes, chopped, peeled, and seeded
1 pound Mussels in shells, scrubbed and de-bearded
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add crushed red pepper flakes and garlic. Cook until garlic begins to color, about 2-3 minutes.
2. Stir in chopped tomatoes, parsley, basil, and mint. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Add clam juice, shrimp, and cover the pan. Cook over low heat for 2 minutes, stirring once.
4. Add mussels and brandy. Cover and cook until shrimp are pink and mussels open, about 2-3 more minutes.
5. Carefully remove mussels from the sauce.
6. Cook penne according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and transfer to a warm serving bowl.
7. Top pasta with hot sauce, stirring well to combine. Place mussels on top of the pasta.
8. Garnish with chopped parsley and lemon rind.
